name: Scotch Broth
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large kettle, combine the soup bones, water, salt, and peppercorns. Cover and bring to a boil.
2. Reduce heat and simmer for 2½ hours or until the meat comes easily off the bones.
3. Remove the bones and strain the broth into another container. Allow it to cool and chill.
4. Skim off any excess fat from the surface of the broth.
5. Remove the meat from the bones and return it to the broth along with the chopped vegetables, pearl barley, salt, and peppercorns.
6. Bring the mixture back to a boil. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer for about 1 hour or until all the vegetables and barley are tender.
7. This recipe serves 6-8 people (2 quarts).
